title: Docker in the Real World: The MegaCorp Journey
description: A guided, hands-on tour of how Docker is actually used inside a large-scale company -- from a developer's first container, through legacy app containment, image best practices, and scaling a service like a real fleet.

steps.title: 2. Real World -- Legacy & Modern, Side by Side
3. Best Practices -- Fixing a Bloated Image
4. Large Scale -- Scaling a Service Like a Fleet
